title: Implement device registry updates
description:
Look up devices and apply metadata updates:
- Use dr.async_get_device() with MQTT identifiers
- Call dr.async_update_device() for area_id and/or name_by_user
- Use ar.async_get_area_by_name() to resolve area names to IDs
- Create areas that don't exist (matches Z-Wave behavior)

Depends on MQTT subscription being complete.

title: Implement MQTT subscription and payload parsing
description:
Subscribe to MQTT discovery topics and parse payloads:
- Subscribe to homeassistant/+/+/config (configurable prefix)
- Parse JSON payloads
- Extract device dict with identifiers, suggested_area, name
- Handle malformed payloads gracefully

Depends on scaffold being complete.

title: Create integration scaffold
description:
Set up the basic integration structure:
- custom_components/mqtt_device_sync/
- manifest.json with MQTT dependency
- __init__.py with async_setup_entry stub
- const.py with DOMAIN and defaults
- config_flow.py for UI setup
- strings.json and translations/en.json

This is the foundation all other work depends on.

title: Implement ha-mqtt-device-sync integration
description: Home Assistant custom integration that syncs device metadata (area, name) from MQTT discovery payloads to the device registry. Addresses HA's limitation where suggested_area only works on first discovery.

title: Add deduplication logic
description:
Prevent spamming the device registry with redundant updates:
- Track last-known state per device (area, name)
- Skip update if values unchanged
- Consider using device registry events to stay in sync

Phase 2 robustness work.

title: Add retry logic for timing issues
description:
Handle case where discovery arrives before device is registered:
- Queue updates when device not found
- Retry after short delay (e.g., 5 seconds)
- Clear queue entry once successfully applied
- Give up after N retries with warning log

Phase 2 robustness work.

title: Implement configuration options
description:
Add user-configurable options via config flow:
- discovery_prefix: string, default 'homeassistant'
- sync_area: bool, default true
- sync_name: bool, default false
- overwrite_existing: bool, default false (only set if unset)

Options should be modifiable after setup via options flow.

title: Write documentation
description:
Complete user documentation:
- Configuration examples for Z2M, rtl-haos, Tasmota
- Troubleshooting guide
- Compatibility notes
- Update README with full usage info

Phase 3 polish.

title: Write tests
description:
Add pytest tests:
- Unit tests for payload parsing
- Integration tests with mock MQTT
- Test retry logic
- Test config flow

Phase 3 polish.

title: Add HACS compatibility
description:
Make integration installable via HACS:
- hacs.json with proper metadata
- README.md with installation instructions, badges
- Validate with hacs/action if possible

Phase 3 polish.

title: Implement logging
description:
Add appropriate logging at each level:
- DEBUG: every discovery message processed
- INFO: area/name changes applied
- WARNING: device not found after retries, malformed payloads

Phase 2 robustness work.
